    🙏 About Us

    Our Story

    Connecting devotees from Odisha to the sacred temples of India, one yatra at a time.

    Our Journey

    From a Small Dream to
    Thousands of Smiles

    AnandaRath was born from a simple belief — that every devotee deserves a comfortable, safe, and deeply spiritual yatra experience. Founded in Odisha, we started with a single bus and a passion for service.

    Today, we've grown into one of the most trusted pilgrimage travel organizers in the region, having served over 5,000 happy pilgrims across 150+ successful yatras to India's holiest destinations.

    Our dedicated team ensures every detail is taken care of — from AC sleeper buses and quality meals to guided darshan arrangements — so you can focus entirely on your spiritual journey.

    3+

    Years of Trust

    ✨ Why Us

    Why Choose AnandaRath?

    AC Sleeper Bus

    Comfortable 2x1 seating with USB charging points and reclining seats

    Meals Included

    Odia Cooked Food Pure Veg breakfast and dinner at quality restaurants en-route

    Safe Travel

    Experienced drivers, GPS tracking, travel insurance for all passengers

    Guided Darshan

    Religious guide & complete darshan arrangements at every temple

    Photography

    Professional photography to capture your spiritual journey and special moments

    Our Values

    What Drives Us

    Devotion First

    Every decision is made with devotion and respect for the spiritual significance of each destination.

    Community

    We build a community of like-minded pilgrims who share the joy of spiritual journeys together.

    Excellence

    From bus quality to meal standards, we never compromise on the quality of our services.

    Accessibility

    Making sacred pilgrimages accessible and affordable to devotees from all walks of life.

    Every Yatra, A Spiritual Experience. We organize premium pilgrimage tours from Odisha to sacred destinations across India.
